data.title: PAR Technology Corporation Announces Pricing of $250.0 Million of Convertible Senior Notes
data.description: In New Hartford, N.Y., PAR Technology Corporation (NYSE: PAR) revealed a private offering of $250.0 million aggregate principal amount of 4.00% Convertible Senior Notes due 2031. The Notes will be offered to qualified institutional buyers per Rule 144A under the Securities Act of 1933. The Company granted initial purchasers a 30-day option to buy up to an additional $37.5 million aggregate principal amount of the Notes.

data.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute vows to challenge Basel's 'hostile' stance on cryptocurrency, aiming to influence US regulators on Bitcoin adoption amidst proposed Basel framework changes.
data.description: The Bitcoin Policy Institute aims to ensure that U.S. regulators make accurate decisions regarding Bitcoin as the Federal Reserve introduces proposals to implement the Basel framework.

data.title: Alibaba's MAISEAT Secures Primary Ticketing Role for GAI EVOLUTION 2026 World Tour in Malaysia
data.description: MAISEAT, the global events ticketing platform under Damai Entertainment (HKEX: 1060), a subsidiary of Alibaba Group, recently announced a significant milestone by acquiring its inaugural primary ticketing responsibility. The platform has been appointed as the official primary ticketing partner for the concerts of Chinese rapper GAI. This development took place in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on March 13, 2026.

data.title: iQIYI Leads AI Storytelling as Original Micro-Animations Gain Strong Traction
data.description: On March 13, 2026, iQIYI, China's top online entertainment platform, unveiled two new AI-generated micro-animations, "My Mecha is a Bit OP" and "Imperial Exorcist Guards", on its mainland Chinese platform. These animations have garnered significant attention from audiences.

data.title: Metal Logic Purchases Pilbara Site to Deploy Grade-Agnostic, Scalable Modular Clean Steel Smelter
data.description: New modular smelting technology developed in Australia is expected to tap into untapped iron ore resources worth billions, generating employment opportunities in the region and producing affordable, environmentally-friendly steel. The first modules are scheduled for deployment on-site by the end of the first half of the year 2026.

According to Korean media reports, Apple may pursue an aggressive pricing strategy for its foldable iPhone, potentially lowering the expected price from $2,400 to $2,000. In response, Samsung may keep the prices of its next-generation Galaxy foldables, the Z8 series, unchanged.

data.title: transcosmos helps Wacoal build and operate e-commerce websites for Asian markets
data.description: transcosmos has announced its collaboration with Wacoal Holdings Corp., based in Kyoto, Japan, aiming to enhance customer experience and facilitate the brand's worldwide growth. The partnership focuses on implementing a streamlined design and improved operational efficiency. This move is set to boost the brand's global expansion efforts and solidify its presence in the market. The collaboration aims at achieving these objectives by integrating innovative solutions and delivering exceptional services.
